prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GUNCLEANKIT-15PC Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 15pc Pistol Cleaning Tool Kit .357 .40 .45 Caliber Description: The ASR Outdoor Pistol Gun Cleaning Kit is an economical, user-friendly and compact gun cleaning kit with the tools you'll need to keep pistols clean and running smoothly. Whether you're a recreational shooter, certified Gunsmith or beginner gun hobbyist, this set of pistol cleaning tools is convenient to maintain firearms at home or on the road, or if you're camping, hiking or going on an outdoors adventure. Notably, this gun cleaning kit is for .45, .357 or .40 calibers.

This pistol cleaning kit includes the following components:
-3 bronze brushes
-3 cotton mops
-3 brass jags
-1 patch holder
-1 muzzle guard
-1 solid aluminum handle
-1 plastic oil bottle (oil not included)
-1 plastic storage box with a sturdy lock
-2 brass rods (6" 150mm and 3-38" 60mm;)

All of the gun cleaning accessories listed above fit neatly inside a sturdy plastic carrying case, so you can easily bring your cleaning kit with you or add it to your range bag. The carry case will ensure that your tools and cleaning supplies stay organized during transit.

Any firearm owner knows the importance of keeping your gun clean in order to allow your guns to fire safely and function properly; cleaning your gun is crucial to maintain accuracy and avoid malfunctions when shooting and the ASR Outdoor Aluminum Handle Pistol Gun Cleaning Tool Kit will help to keep your pistols clean, polished, rust-free and dependable. Search Terms: gun cleaning supplies cleaninng kits firearm brushes double ended hand tools soft bristle for nylon brush plastic copper abrasive scrubbing hunting Features: - PISTOL CLEANING KIT: Keep your firearms, specifically pistols, running smoothly with this pistol cleaning kit for .357, .40 and .45 calibers; the set of tools includes 3 bronze brushes, 3 cotton mops, 3 brass jags, 1 patch holder, 1 muzzle guard, 1 solid aluminum handle, 1 plastic oil bottle (oil not included), 1 plastic storage box with sturdy lock and 2 brass rods (6" 150mm and 3-38" 60mm;) - GUN CLEANING AND MAINTENANCE: Any firearm owner knows the importance of keeping your gun clean in order to allow your guns to fire safely and function properly; cleaning your gun is crucial to maintain accuracy and avoid malfunctions when shooting and the ASR Outdoor pistol gun cleaning tool kit will help to keep your pistols clean, polished, rust free and dependable - PORTABLE CARRYING CASE: All of the gun cleaning accessories included in this pistol cleaning tool kit fit neatly inside a sturdy plastic carrying case, so you can easily bring your cleaning kit with you or add it to your range bag; The carry case will ensure that your tools and cleaning supplies stay organized and together during transit - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 3lbs; Dimensions: 8 inches x 7 inches x 4.1 inches; Kit includes plastic storage lock box; Rod working length 177m or 7 inches; - NOTE: This pistol cleaning kit is for .45, .40 and .357 calibers. When cleaning your firearm, be sure to follow proper safety practices by ensuring the chamber and barrel are clear and that the cylinder or magazine are also clear of ammunition === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 15-Piece Pistol Cleaning Kit .357 .40 .45 Caliber

anthropic.title_differentiation: Includes Bronze Brushes, Cotton Mops, Brass Jags, Aluminum Handle, Portable Storage Case, Complete Maintenance Set

openai.title_differentiation: Bronze Brushes, Cotton Mops, Brass Jags, Patch Holder, Aluminum Handle, Locking Case, For 357 40 45 Caliber
